title: Cauchy's theorem from Sylow
classification:
  areas:
  - algebra
  topics:
  - groups
relations: []
review: draft
---

::: corollary
If a prime $p$ divides $\abs G$ then $G$ contains an element of order $p$: take
a Sylow $p\dash$subgroup and any nontrivial element's appropriate power.
:::
